title: Crystal Tea Light Holder Medium 5x10cm - Luxury Diamond-Cut Glass Candle Stand for Centrepiece, Dining Table & Party Decor - Single Piece
features: ✨ Handcrafted Brilliance: Expertly cut from premium optical crystal to create mesmerising light refraction – each piece is polished to perfection for dazzling clarity.
📏 Ideal Medium Size: At 5x10cm (H), this standalone piece works beautifully as a dining table centrepiece or elegant shelf accent.
🎨 Timeless Versatility: Its clean-lined design complements both contemporary and traditional interiors – perfect for homes, weddings or boutique hotels.
🎁 Luxury Gift Presentation: Arrives in a sophisticated gift box, making it a thoughtful present for anniversaries, housewarmings or festive occasions.
🔍 Premium Quality Assurance: Crafted from durable, lead-free optical glass that's easy to clean and maintains its sparkle over time.
description: Add a touch of luxury to any setting with our Medium 5x10cm Crystal Tea Light Holder. Expertly crafted from diamond-cut crystal, this elegant candle stand creates mesmerizing light reflections, perfect for dining tables, weddings, or as a chic home accent. Presented in a premium gift box, it’s an unforgettable present for any occasion. ✔ Single Premium Holder – 5x10cm size, ideal as a statement piece. ✔ Diamond-Cut Brilliance – Precision-cut facets for maximum sparkle. ✔ Versatile Decor – Elevates dinner parties, spas, or office spaces. ✔ Luxury Gift Packaging – Beautifully boxed for instant gifting.
